notes: The platformer mixing-bus graph (R-SYS-006): the jump and coin sounds route through Sound Effects (id 5a08393cca219c68) into Master (id 66f78214eb2942ad). Bus ids are L-33 stable intra-file ids (enforced inside a project dir; human labels live in `name`). The presentation-observer audio package (src/packages/audio/) mixes on miniaudio's NULL backend in the headless smoke gate -- entirely OFF the deterministic sim path (R-SIM-001).
